import { useScrollReveal } from '../../hooks/useScrollReveal' const NAV_ITEMS = [ { label: 'Dashboard', active: true, badge: null, icon: }, { label: 'My Jobs', active: false, badge: null, icon: }, { label: 'Find Techs',active: false, badge: null, icon: }, { label: 'Assets', active: false, badge: null, icon: }, { label: 'Reminders', active: false, badge: '3', icon: }, { label: 'Payments', active: false, badge: null, icon: }, ] const STATS = [ { label: 'Active Jobs', val: '4', change: '+2 this week', changeColor: 'var(--green)' }, { label: 'Total Spent', val: '₹12,400', change: '3 completed', changeColor: 'var(--text-3)' }, { label: 'Due Reminders', val: '3', change: 'Action needed', changeColor: 'var(--accent)', valColor: 'var(--accent)' }, ] const JOBS = [ { title: 'AC Unit Not Cooling', sub: 'Amit Sharma · 2.3 km · Today 3 PM', dot: 'var(--accent)', badge: 'badge-accent', status: 'In Progress', price: '₹1,800' }, { title: 'Electrical Wiring Fault', sub: 'Ravi Kumar · 1.1 km · Tomorrow 10 AM', dot: 'var(--teal)', badge: 'badge-teal', status: 'Assigned', price: '₹3,200' }, { title: 'Plumbing Leak — Kitchen', sub: '3 technicians matched · Awaiting selection', dot: 'var(--border)', badge: 'badge-neutral', status: 'Open', price: '₹900' }, { title: 'Geyser Installation', sub: 'Deepak Yadav · Rated 5 stars', dot: 'var(--green)', badge: 'badge-green', status: 'Completed', price: '₹2,400' }, ] export default function DashboardPreview() { const headerRef = useScrollReveal() const previewRef = useScrollReveal() return (
